title: taraxacum balticum
intro: Taraxacum balticum, also known as the Baltic dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain inulin and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum balticum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum balticum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
